entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: General plant life that suffers physiological and biochemical damages upon exposure to stresses

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental pressures that cause physiological and biochemical damages to plants

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Cultivated plant species that experience stress-induced injuries and yield losses

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of crops, which can be substantially reduced by stress

entities.name: STRESS ADAPTATION MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological processes used by crop species to cope with environmental stresses

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic constitution of an individual organism, which influences stress adaptation

entities.name: GENOMIC STRUCTURAL VARIATION
entities.description: Changes in the structure of the genome that impact gene function

entities.name: GENE FUNCTION
entities.description: The specific biological role or activity performed by a gene

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material of an organism

entities.name: PLANT PHENOTYPE
entities.description: The observable physical or biochemical characteristics of a plant

entities.name: TRAIT OF INTEREST
entities.description: Specific characteristics of a plant targeted for study or improvement

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of gene function and its interaction with the phenotype

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of developing desired characteristics in plant species
